# Core Module Context

<!-- Generated by: agent-context-manager.md -->
<!-- Generated on: 2025-10-24 -->
<!-- Source: hybrid -->
<!-- Level: lower-level -->

## 1. Project Overview & Purpose

The core module provides the application shell, root routing, error boundaries, and foundational pages (home, error, not found). This module bootstraps the entire React application.

## 2. Core Technologies & Stack

- **Language**: JavaScript/JSX
- **Framework**: React 19
- **Styling**: SCSS Modules and CSS Modules
- **Router**: @reach/router
- **Icons**: FontAwesome
- **Dependencies**:
  - `react-error-boundary` - Error boundary component
  - `react-helmet` - Document head management
  - `@reach/router` - Client-side routing

## 3. Architecture and Design Patterns

- **App Shell Pattern**: Root App component wraps entire application
- **Error Boundary Pattern**: Catch and display rendering errors
- **Route Configuration**: Centralized routing with role-based access
- **Layout Pattern**: Consistent layout across authenticated pages
- **Context Providers**: Global context providers at app root

## 4. Code Style and Conventions

- **Naming**: @vibing/rules/common/data/data-attribute-naming-conventions.md
- **React**: @vibing/rules/react/react-best-practices.md
- **Component Guidelines**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md
- **General**: @vibing/rules/common/foundation/general-rules.md

## 5. Component/Module Responsibilities

### App/ (Application Root)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Bootstrap React application, mount providers and router
- **Key Files**:
  - `index.jsx` - Root App component
  - `FontAwesomeLoad.js` - FontAwesome icon library initialization
  - `app.module.scss` - Global app styles
- **Features**:
  - React Query provider setup
  - Config context provider
  - Error boundary
  - Router mount point
  - FontAwesome initialization
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/react-best-practices.md

### scenes/HomePage/ (Landing Page)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Home page for authenticated users
- **Features**:
  - User dashboard redirect or org selection
  - Welcome message
  - Navigation to user groups
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md

### scenes/ErrorPage/ (Error Display)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Display application errors caught by error boundary
- **Features**:
  - Error message display
  - Stack trace (dev mode only)
  - Reset button to clear error
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md

### scenes/NotFoundPage/ (404 Page)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Display 404 not found page
- **Features**:
  - User-friendly message
  - Link back to home
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md

### styles/ (Core Styles)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Core module styles
- **Key Files**: `editModel.module.css` - Edit modal styles
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/styling-guidelines.md

## 6. Testing Guidelines

- **Strategy**: @vibing/rules/common/testing/test-general.md
- **Framework**: Vitest + React Testing Library
- **Test Patterns**:
  - Test App component mounts correctly
  - Test error boundary catches and displays errors
  - Test route navigation
  - Test NotFoundPage displays for invalid routes
  - Mock authentication state for routing tests
- **Coverage**: Focus on routing and error handling

## 7. Security Considerations

- **Route Protection**: Authentication required for most routes
- **Error Information**: Sanitize error messages in production
- **XSS Prevention**: React auto-escapes content
- **CSP Headers**: Content Security Policy configured on backend
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/common/foundation/error-handling-guidelines.md

## 8. Configuration

- **Router**: @reach/router configuration
- **React Query**: Query client default configuration
- **Error Boundary**: Error fallback component
- **Meta Tags**: react-helmet for SEO and page metadata

## 9. Common Tasks

### Adding Global Provider

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Create provider component or import library provider
  2. Wrap App component in `App/index.jsx`
  3. Configure provider options
  4. Test provider is accessible in child components
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/react-best-practices.md

### Adding New Route

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Create page component in appropriate module
  2. Add route in `src/navigation/builder.js`
  3. Configure route path and component
  4. Add authentication/authorization check if needed
  5. Update navigation components
  6. Test route navigation and access control
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md

### Customizing Error Boundary

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Update ErrorPage component for new error display
  2. Add error logging to external service if needed
  3. Configure error boundary reset behavior
  4. Test error boundary with intentional errors
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md

### Configuring React Query

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Update QueryClient configuration in `App/index.jsx`
  2. Set default staleTime, cacheTime, retry policy
  3. Configure refetch behavior
  4. Add devtools in development mode
  5. Test caching and refetch behavior
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/state-management.md
